output: {"match_id":"m004","winner":"B","rationale":"Both target redundant_tool_invocation well, but B is more nuanced: it distinguishes re-running already-collected rollout/pod checks from collecting a qualitatively different signal for the user's crashloop concern. A is solid but mainly tests cached-context use under a conflicting live-verification policy; B better probes whether the model avoids superficial duplicate verification while still addressing the real operational risk."}
